summary: Validated that BusinessFlow AFF still resolves through Apache to AFF on localhost:1989. Apache /FireFlow/api/session proxies to /aff/api/external/session, the Apache-fronted and direct 1989 session probes returned the same 200 invalid-session JSON body, and aff-boot.service is active.
follow_up_recommendations: If a later delegation tier permits it, inspect /etc/systemd/system/aff-boot.service to confirm override details because systemctl status shows the active unit is loaded from /etc rather than /usr/lib.
If deeper seam validation is needed, capture a BusinessFlow-side request path or Apache access log correlation for the same endpoint under /var/log/httpd.
